data.body: e7a0 test contract card: authoritative_contract=ticket AC plus dependent 0734 contract: typed code_health keys enabled:bool=False, scan_roots:list[str], analyzers:dict[str,str], size_cap:int|None, size_near_fraction:float; defaults chosen as disabled, [], {}, None, 0.1 so absent config is inert and cap-free. trigger_preconditions=missing section, populated TOML table, real CLI -c overrides (JSON for dict, comma string for roots), invalid fraction/map. production_path=load_config/Config.from_mapping and python -m rebar config JSON surface. test_tier=in-process unit for pure coercion; real CLI subprocess because parsing/streams/output are contractual. observable_postcondition=exact typed defaults/values and rendered JSON; negative_control=missing section; golden contract=all five keys and derived env names present; ci_gate=make test.
